name: [LEARN-50] Align Challenge Round docs/status and add deterministic mobile surface proof
description: LEARN-50 needs current Challenge Round docs/status alignment plus deterministic proof of the mobile typed-state surface under the existing runtime flag.
acceptanceCriteria: Align LEARN-50 docs/status with current code and add/cite deterministic mobile-surface proof. Docs must state that Challenge Round is API-flag-gated by CHALLENGE_ROUND_RUNTIME_ENABLED=false, mobile renders only typed server fields, and no flag flip is in scope. Correct stale drafted-note wording: current server finalization calls validateNoteDraft() before emitting a drafted note and falls back when grounding fails. Evidence must cover offer accept/decline/don't-ask, active banner, drafted-note review/save/skip, typed SSE/done payload handling, schema grounding requirements, answer-event validation, conservative mastery decision, needs-deepening persistence, and concept-capture remaining parked/gated off. Variants: flag off vs server-emitted typed fields; offered/active/drafting/complete/declined; all-solid vs partial/missing/misconception; invalid answerEventId; grounded vs ungrounded note draft; concept-capture disabled. Expected files include flow docs, mobile session/SSE tests, challenge component tests, session-exchange tests, challenge-round service tests, and schemas tests. This is current-state proof/docs only, not the learner-pull Challenge Round redesign.
riskImpact: P0 V2 learning status gap: Challenge Round readiness cannot be judged cleanly while docs/status and runtime gating are out of sync.
